Regular bowling sessions on Tuesdays, Thursdays, and Saturdays. Club established 1924. All SED tournament participants must be a member of Bowls USA and the Southeast Division.

Annual Holiday Bowl tournament that attracts players from all over the east coast and Florida. Mount Dora LBC is one of the largest Bowls USA affiliated clubs with over 240 members and 14 bowling rinks.
Night bowling under the lights, Monday through Thursday. Sign-in at 6:45 PM.
Regular bowling sessions at Lake Parker Park. Club features a fast green on 8 wide rinks of pro carpet. Part of the SED with 14 member clubs.

The oldest formally organized lawn bowling organization in Florida and tenth oldest in the US. Season runs November to April. Hosts the National Open Lawn Bowling Winter Tournament on alternate years and annual SED championship tournaments.

Year-round lawn bowls on three grass greens at Rio Grande Neighborhood Center, Fenney Putt and Play, and First Responders Recreation Center. Free coaching, games, league and tournament play available.

dates: Monday-Friday 9:15 AM & 2:00 PM, Saturday 9:15 AM, Sunday 2:00 PM
description: Home of International Lawn Bowling in SW Florida. Regular sessions Monday-Friday at 9:15 AM and 2:00 PM, Saturday at 9:15 AM, and Sunday at 2:00 PM. Founded 1987, SED member.
Year-round bowling at historic Pinehurst Resort. The club has been the site of many national and international lawn bowls tournaments since the 1920s. World-class lawn bowl court.

The only professional lawn bowling green in Virginia. Green open daily 3-6 PM April through November. Full schedule includes pairs programs on Tuesdays and Thursdays, about a dozen weekend tournaments, and special matches on Independence Day and Labor Day. 60 members - second only to Central Park in the NED.

description: Founded 1926 in Central Park. Season runs May 1 to November 7, play from 8 AM to dusk. Hosts competitive summer league and several tournaments. Open House events welcoming the public to try the sport for free with instruction and equipment provided.

Regular bowling at Watsessing Park most weekends from mid-April to late October, and Monday and Wednesday nights around 6 PM from May through end of September. New facility opened July 2020.

Chicago's premier lawn bowling destination in Jackson Park near the lakefront. Play Saturdays and Sundays 1-3 PM, Tuesday nights at 6 PM. Play stops at 3 PM for afternoon tea in line with British traditions. Earlier starts for tournaments and holiday events.

Bowls USA National Championships crowning men's and women's champions in singles and pairs. Round-robin format: singles to 21 shots, pairs 18 ends.
